name: Lumière Gentle Hydration Cleanser
description: A soothing, milky cleanser that gently removes impurities while protecting the skin's natural moisture barrier. Enriched with ceramides and hyaluronic acid.

name: Clarify Purifying Foaming Wash
description: An invigorating foaming gel that deeply cleanses pores and removes excess oil without stripping the skin. Contains salicylic acid and tea tree extract.

name: Aura Balance Rosewater Toner
description: A refreshing botanical toner that restores skin pH and preps the face for serums. Infused with pure rose petal water and soothing chamomile.

name: PoreRefine Exfoliating Essence
description: A gentle daily exfoliating liquid that sweeps away dead skin cells to reveal a brighter complexion. Formulated with 5% AHA and BHA.

name: GlowDrop Vitamin C Serum
description: A potent 15% Vitamin C serum that brightens dark spots and evens out skin tone. Packed with antioxidants to protect against environmental stressors.

name: HydroPlump Hyaluronic Acid
description: A multi-molecular weight hyaluronic acid serum that delivers deep hydration to all layers of the skin. Instantly plumps and smooths fine lines.

name: ClearComplex Niacinamide Drops
description: A balancing serum featuring 10% Niacinamide and Zinc to regulate sebum production and minimize the appearance of pores and blemishes.

name: SilkWrap Ceramide Moisturizer
description: A rich, whipped moisturizing cream that locks in hydration and repairs the skin barrier. Formulated with a blend of essential ceramides and peptides.

name: AquaGel Weightless Lotion
description: A fast-absorbing, water-based gel moisturizer that provides oil-free hydration. Leaves a cooling sensation and a matte finish.

name: Radiance Repair Night Cream
description: An intensive overnight treatment featuring encapsulated retinol and squalane. Works while you sleep to renew the skin and reduce signs of aging.

name: SunShield Invisible SPF 50
description: A broad-spectrum chemical sunscreen that goes on completely clear. Leaves no white cast and acts as a perfect gripping primer for makeup.

name: MineralDefense Tinted SPF 30
description: A 100% mineral sunscreen offering gentle protection with zinc oxide. Features a sheer tint to blur imperfections and enhance your natural glow.
